raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The San Bernardino City & County Continuum of Care has received a $9.3 million Homeless Emergency Aid Program grant.",
    "The funds will assist individuals or families who are homeless or at imminent risk of homelessness.",
    "The Homeless Partnership has adopted a 'Housing First' model of care.",
    "The 'Housing First' model aims to provide permanent housing quickly with supportive services as needed.",
    "The 'Housing First' model has been shown to decrease the amount of time people experience homelessness.",
    "The 'Housing First' model increases the effectiveness of supportive services.",
    "The 'Housing First' model lowers the cost of services as a whole.",
    "The 'Housing First' model reduces future episodes of homelessness."
  ]
}
```
